# empty.guru — full page index

> Teachings (Dharma). Every canonical page, its human URL, its raw Markdown source, and a short description. Fetch the .md URLs for clean, JS-free text.

## Helpful Teachings (Dharma) EG
- Page: https://empty.guru/
- Markdown: https://empty.guru/README.md

## Glossary

- Markdown: https://empty.guru/GLOSSARY.md
- Summary: “All phenomena that arise from causes, The Tathāgata has taught their cause, And that which is their cessation; Thus has proclaimed the Great Renunciant. src

## Discipline (Vinayavastu)
- Page: https://empty.guru/docs/#/collection-1-words-of-the-buddha--kangyur/volume-1-discipline--vinayavastu/README
- Markdown: https://empty.guru/docs/collection-1-words-of-the-buddha--kangyur/volume-1-discipline--vinayavastu/README.md
- Summary: Homage to them who severed the bonds, Destroyed the whole host of tīrthikas, Vanquished the armies of Māra, And thus discovered this awakening.

- Summary: 1. Rupasari's Son 1. Tīrthikas 1. Two Novices 1. Scaring Away a Crow 1. Killing an Arhat 1. Persons whose hands have been cut off 1. Appendix
